labels.note: The four calculateTax* methods implement the same tax-bracket algorithm and differ primarily in income limits, base amounts, and tax rates.
labels.refactoringNote: Replace the four methods with one parameterized tax-calculation method that receives the income limits, base amounts, and tax rates for the selected family status.

labels.note: The get*ReceiptsTotalAmount methods repeat the same loop, receipt-kind comparison, accumulation, and rounding logic for each receipt category.
labels.refactoringNote: Create one receipt-total method that accepts the receipt kind and reuse it for Basic, Entertainment, Travel, Health, and Other totals.
